summary: Comprehensive testing of new recurring task and late completion features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: Library page with recurring rules section, Generate Now button, Add Task form with recurring toggle/day intervals/allocated time, Tasks page showing Late badge, time allowed, started time, and recurring task icon. All features working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (console warning only, not affecting functionality)

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/task-templates creates recurring template with is_recurring=true, day_intervals, allocated_time - SUCCESS
Backend: PUT /api/task-templates/{id} updates template including is_active toggle - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/task-templates/generate-now creates tasks from active recurring templates - SUCCESS
Backend: Generated task has title format 'Name (Mon DD HH:MM AM/PM)' and task_type=RECURRING - SUCCESS
Backend: POST /api/tasks/{id}/complete allows completion from NOT_COMPLETED status - SUCCESS
Backend: Late completion sets is_late=true and calculates actual_time_taken - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/tasks returns tasks with is_late and actual_time_taken fields - SUCCESS
Backend: Staff cannot create templates (403) - SUCCESS
Backend: Staff cannot trigger generate-now (403) - SUCCESS
Backend: Cannot complete from PENDING status (400) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Library page shows Recurring Rules section with Active badge - SUCCESS
Frontend: Library page shows day intervals and allocated time - SUCCESS
Frontend: Library page Generate Now button triggers task generation - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Task form has recurring toggle - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Task form shows day intervals input when recurring enabled - SUCCESS
Frontend: Add Task form shows allocated time picker when recurring enabled - SUCCESS
Frontend: Tasks page shows recurring task with correct title format - SUCCESS
Frontend: Task card shows 'Allowed: X min' display - SUCCESS
Frontend: Task card shows 'Late' badge when task.is_late is true - SUCCESS
Frontend: Task card shows 'Started:' time - SUCCESS
Frontend: Staff can view Start button for pending assigned tasks - SUCCESS
Frontend: Staff can upload proof and see View Proof button - SUCCESS
seed_data_creation: Test templates and tasks created during backend tests with TEST_ prefix. Templates cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All recurring task and late completion features fully tested and working. Key features verified: (1) TaskTemplate CRUD with is_recurring, is_active, day_intervals, allocated_time, assigned_to fields. (2) Generate-now endpoint creates tasks with RECURRING type and title format 'Name (Mon DD HH:MM AM/PM)'. (3) Tasks have is_late, actual_time_taken, template_id fields. (4) Complete endpoint accepts NOT_COMPLETED status for late completion. (5) Library page shows Recurring Rules section with badges and controls. (6) TaskCard shows Late badge, Allowed time, Started time, recurring icon.

recurring_templates.create_template: Working - creates with is_recurring, day_intervals, allocated_time
recurring_templates.update_template: Working - can toggle is_active, update fields
recurring_templates.generate_now: Working - creates tasks for today matching day_intervals

late_completion.is_late_flag: Working - set to true when deadline passed
late_completion.actual_time_taken: Working - calculated from started_at to completed_at

frontend_displays.recurring_rules_section: Working - shows Active badge, day intervals, time
frontend_displays.add_task_recurring_toggle: Working - shows day intervals and time inputs
frontend_displays.late_badge: Working - shows orange 'Late' badge on task cards
